author: gowtham0992
name: Text Diffusion: Masked Diffusion Language Model (MDLM)
blurb: First text diffusion submission. MDLM training (Sahoo et al., NeurIPS 2024): random masking at rate t~U(0,1), predict masked tokens, ELBO-weighted loss. SUBS parameterization (carry-over unmasking, zero mask probabilities). Stratified t sampling. Causal attention for AR eval compatibility. Eval: sliding window.
